description: Canonical schema governing the structure of all prompts engineered for VS Code execution within the ARCHON PRIME remediation workflow.

phase.description: Remediation phase this prompt belongs to.

spec_reference.description: Reference to architecture design spec section.

target_scope.description: Files, directories, or modules affected by this prompt.

operations.description: List of operations to perform in deterministic order.

non_deletion_rule.description: Ensures no files are deleted unless explicitly authorized.

expected_outputs.description: Artifacts expected to be produced by prompt execution.

validation_steps.description: Checks to confirm prompt execution succeeded.
